location: On the ground behind a building in the far west of Academy Gate Town, in Liurnia of the Lakes — just before and to the left of the bridge leading to the locked main gate of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.

source.name: Ground item behind a building, Academy Gate Town

tactics: Academy Gate Town is a partially sunken settlement crawling with Land Octopi and scarabs — approach the western buildings carefully rather than beelining across open water.
The pickup sits just short of the bridge to the Academy's locked main gate, which itself needs the Academy Glintstone Key questline to open — you don't need that key for this shield.
It's easy to walk right past this corner of town if you're focused on the bridge ahead — hug the western building line instead.
lore: A light wooden roundshield reinforced with metal bands, valued for being easy to handle even though it can't block as much as a true metal shield. Its design is meant to evoke a starry night sky said to foretell fate.

builds.name: Early Strength parry shield
builds.why: Only requires 8 Strength with no other stat investment, making it a viable, weightless-feeling off-hand block/parry option for almost any early build.
